violent.example: The violent storm damaged many homes.
violent.example_zh: 猛烈的暴風雨毀壞了許多房屋。

violet.example: She picked a small violet flower.
violet.example_zh: 她摘了一朵小小的紫羅蘭。

violet.example: The sky turned violet at dusk.

visible.example: The stars are visible on a clear night.
visible.example_zh: 晴朗的夜晚看得見星星。

vision.example: She has a clear vision for the future.
vision.example_zh: 她對未來有清楚的願景。

vitamin.example: Oranges are rich in vitamin C.

vivid.example: She has vivid memories of that day.
vivid.example_zh: 她對那天的記憶很鮮明。

vocabulary.example_zh: 閱讀能增加你的字彙量。

volleyball.example: We played volleyball on the beach.

volume.example: This bottle has a large volume.

voter.example: Every voter lined up at the station.
voter.example_zh: 每位選民在投票站排隊。

wage.example: Workers asked for a higher wage.

wagon.example: The horse pulled a heavy wagon.
wagon.example_zh: 馬拉著一輛沉重的馬車。

wander.example: We wandered around the old town.

warmth.example: We enjoyed the warmth of the fire.
warmth.example_zh: 我們享受著火爐的溫暖。

warn.example: The sign warns us of the danger.
warn.example_zh: 這個標誌警告我們有危險。

waterfall.example: The waterfall fell from a high cliff.
waterfall.example_zh: 瀑布從高高的懸崖傾瀉而下。

wealthy.example: The wealthy man gave money to the poor.

web.example: I found the answer on the web.
A spider spun a web in the corner.

wed.example: They will wed in the spring.

weed.example: He pulled the weeds from the garden.
weed.example_zh: 他把花園裡的雜草拔掉。

weekly.example: We have a weekly meeting on Monday.

weep.example: She began to weep at the sad news.
weep.example_zh: 聽到悲傷的消息她開始哭泣。

whip.example: The rider used a whip on the horse.
Whip the cream until it is thick.

whistle.example: He whistled a tune as he walked.

wicked.example: The wicked witch scared the children.
wicked.example_zh: 邪惡的女巫嚇壞了孩子們。

widen.example: They plan to widen the narrow road.
widen.example_zh: 他們打算把這條窄路拓寬。

wipe.example: Please wipe the table after lunch.
wipe.example_zh: 午餐後請把桌子擦乾淨。

wisdom.example_zh: 我們從經驗中學得智慧。

wrap.example: She wrapped the gift in pretty paper.

wrist.example: He wears a watch on his wrist.

yearly.example: We take a yearly trip to the sea.
yearly.example_zh: 我們每年都去一趟海邊。
這個節慶每年舉辦一次。

yell.example: Don't yell; I can hear you.
We heard a loud yell outside.
yell.example_zh: 我們聽見外面一聲大叫。

yolk.example: The yolk of the egg is yellow.

youngster.example: The youngsters played in the park.
youngster.example_zh: 那些年輕人在公園裡玩。

zipper.example: The zipper on my jacket is stuck.
